detail.description:
Game of Thrones: Kingsroad is an action RPG game based on HBO's TV series, bringing Westeros to life on an unprecedented scale with incredible detail. 

In a land where ice-cold conspiracies and blazing wars coexist, you will walk the perilous line between honor and survival.
As darkness stirs beyond the Wall and the order of the kingdoms collapses, your choices will forge a new history for Westeros.

■ Explore the world of Game of Thrones 
Explore the epic saga of the Seven Kingdoms, brought to

- Convenience & miscellaneous improvements
